rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0001
rows.name:
Earthlings. Thank you for
this thrilling battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0002
rows.name:
North of here lies a land covered
in sheer, pitch-black rock[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0003
rows.name:
A land where boiling lava
flows through its fissures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0004
rows.name: That is the Growth stronghold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0005
rows.name:
May fortune favor you in
battle on your journey ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even though they're enemies,
they were reasonable guys-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0007
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0008
rows.name:
He said they were mercenaries. Maybe
they'd even fight alongside us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0009
rows.name:
Tatsu would welcome that-mo!
Tatsu loves doggies-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0010
rows.name:
You absolutely cannot say
that in front of Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0011
rows.name:
You'll get roasted till you're crispy and
have your skin sliced off piece by piece...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0012
rows.name: Wha—!? Tatsu is not Peking Duck-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0013
rows.name: Haha! You know your food, huh? Impressive![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0014
rows.name: I'm not happy, meh~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0015
rows.name: Everyone, listen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0016
rows.name:
It seems Lao was admitted to
NLA's B.B. Maintenance Center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0017
rows.name: He's safe then. That's good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0018
rows.name: Let's hurry and go visit him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0019
rows.name: Right[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0020
rows.name: Elma-san, what's wrong?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0021
rows.name: Sorry. I was just worried about Lao.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09080100_MSG0022
rows.name: Come on, let's bo back to NLA.[ST:wait ]
